item.name: Island Mandragora Queen
item.description: With just a single exposure to the sunlight outside of your bag, this island Mandragora Queen shall be primed to bear you forth like the noblest of steeds.

mount.name: Island Mandragora Queen
mount.action: Summon forth your island Mandragora Queen, a well-cultivated vegetable fit for a king.
mount.description: The life of this island-grown princess was forever changed when she met her future husband the island Tomato King, whom the tides had borne to her. Overcoming their difference in origin, they wed and unified the island's vegetables under the banner of the West Mandra Empire.
mount.tooltip:
I fear a diet comprised entirely
of one type of root vegetable
will not hold up to scrutiny...
- Hinageshi
